style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A central rounded boundary labelled NETWORKED ENVIRONMENT. Inside it, four labelled rounded badges, each marked with a small claw symbol, reading DEVOPS, NETOPS, CYBEROPS, and MONITORING, connected to one another by thin lines to show collaboration. On the right side, a rust-coloured badge labelled WHITE-HAT CLAW faces a dashed-outline badge labelled SIMULATED THREAT ACTOR across a line labelled CAT AND MOUSE. A small caption below reads CONTINUOUS LEARNING AUTONOMOUS WORKERS. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A central rounded boundary labelled NETWORKED ENVIRONMENT. Inside it, four labelled rounded badges, each marked with a small claw symbol, reading DEVOPS, NETOPS, CYBEROPS, and MONITORING, connected to one another by thin lines to show collaboration. On the right side, a rust-coloured badge labelled WHITE-HAT CLAW faces a dashed-outline badge labelled SIMULATED THREAT ACTOR across a line labelled CAT AND MOUSE. A small caption below reads CONTINUOUS LEARNING AUTONOMOUS WORKERS. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
